note: Three bounded contexts emerge from the domain. School is a shared reference — owned by Conversation Management (loaded from DB at session init) and passed into Decision Intelligence as a pre-seeded anchor. It is not an entity inside Knowledge Retrieval.

bounded_contexts.name: Conversation Management
bounded_contexts.owns: The full lifecycle of a user session from creation to close, and every conversation turn including sequencing, persistence, and response delivery.

entities.name: ConversationHistory
entities.role: Persisted message records, loaded at session init. Append-only log — created once, never mutated.

value_objects.name: User
value_objects.role: Identity reference — pre-resolved by external auth API, never authenticated here. Immutable reference to User entity in external Auth BC — never created or mutated in this context.

value_objects.name: School
value_objects.role: Immutable reference — loaded from DB at session init, passed to Decision Intelligence as pre-seed. Never created or mutated in this context.

value_objects.name: Intent
value_objects.role: Classified per turn; drives routing to Decision Intelligence and Knowledge Retrieval

value_objects.name: AssistantResponse
value_objects.role: Grounded response returned to the caller after evidence injection

responsibilities: Manage session lifecycle (created → initializing → idle ⇄ active → closed)
Load user profile, school, conversation history, and purchase history at session start
Classify intent on every user message before any other processing
Sequence conversation turns and enforce turn ordering invariants
Assemble and return the grounded AssistantResponse to the caller

bounded_contexts.name: Decision Intelligence
bounded_contexts.owns: Progressive accumulation of user preference signals and construction of every retrieval query from context — never from the raw message.

entities.name: DecisionContext
entities.role: Accumulates signals across turns; drives retrieval query construction; never regresses

value_objects.name: RetrievalQuery
value_objects.role: Point-in-time context snapshot; constructed from intent + accumulated context; passed to Knowledge Retrieval as input artifact; immutable; never mutated

value_objects.name: PreferenceSignal
value_objects.role: Single extracted preference; immutable once created; accumulated monotonically into DecisionContext

value_objects.name: RetrievedEvidence
value_objects.role: Received from Knowledge Retrieval; passed back to Conversation Management for response injection

responsibilities: Extract PreferenceSignal values from each user message turn
Accumulate signals into DecisionContext monotonically — never remove signals
Evaluate context gaps and determine when context reaches ready state
Emit clarification signal when gaps prevent a meaningful recommendation
Construct RetrievalQuery from intent + accumulated DecisionContext (never raw message)
Route query to the correct knowledge source: product_catalog or referral_program_rules

bounded_contexts.name: Knowledge Retrieval
bounded_contexts.owns: All knowledge sources available to the assistant and the execution of semantic retrieval against them.

value_objects.name: Product
value_objects.role: Immutable external reference; sourced from knowledge base, never owned or mutated by this BC; retrieved by semantic relevance; never invented by the LLM

value_objects.name: ReferralRule
value_objects.role: Immutable external reference; platform-defined; sourced from knowledge base, never owned or mutated by this BC; retrieved by semantic relevance; never rewritten by the LLM

value_objects.name: RetrievedEvidence
value_objects.role: The result of retrieval execution; returned to Decision Intelligence for injection into response generation

responsibilities: Maintain the product catalog as a semantically searchable knowledge source
Maintain referral program rules as a semantically searchable knowledge source
Execute semantic retrieval for a given RetrievalQuery
Return top-matching RetrievedEvidence to Decision Intelligence

context_map.description: Conversation Management orchestrates the turn loop. Decision Intelligence builds and routes the retrieval query. Knowledge Retrieval executes retrieval and returns evidence. Evidence flows back through Decision Intelligence to Conversation Management for grounded response assembly. This maps directly onto the RAG pipeline.

interactions.when: When context is partial/ready/enriched with product_inquiry or referral_question intent

rag_pipeline_as_context_flow: Conversation Management classifies intent and activates the turn
Decision Intelligence builds the retrieval query from accumulated context
Knowledge Retrieval executes the query and returns evidence
Decision Intelligence passes evidence back to Conversation Management
Conversation Management assembles the grounded response and returns it to the caller
